title: Gorilla Heavy Duty Spray Adhesive, 400ml – Fast Drying, High Strength Mist Spray that Dries Clear | Permanently Bonds Wood, Metal, Fabric, Glass, Leather, Stone, Ceramics & More
features: GORILLA TOUGH: Gorilla Heavy Duty Spray Adhesive offers high bonding strength, infused with Gorilla's renowned toughness, ensuring permanent adhesion for a wide range of multi-surface applications.

FAST DRYING & REPOSITIONABLE: This adhesive mist offers the best of both worlds - repositionable, so once applied you have up to 5 minutes to re-adjust and get it right but also fast-drying – no waiting for hours for it to take hold.

BONDS WITH: Gorilla Heavy Duty Spray Adhesive dries clear, ensuring a clean and professional-looking finish on a variety of materials. Bonds with wood, MDF, metal, glass, ceramic, leather, and more for strong adhesion across various surfaces.

BEST FOR: Gorilla Heavy Duty Spray Adhesive is perfect for a wide variety of projects including DIY and craft, photo mounting, upholstery tasks, and office-related applications, providing a high strength bond for diverse needs

HOW TO USE: Ensure surfaces are clean and dirt free. Shake can well before using and hold it 15-20cm from surfaces. Spray an even coat of adhesive to both surfaces. Allow adhesive to partially dry for approx. 1 minute before positioning surfaces together
